Privacy Policy — Relaxing Sleep Music

Last updated: April 22, 2026
Developer: Sam Krish

1. Introduction

Thank you for using Relaxing Sleep Music ("the App", "we", "our", or "us"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our application on Android devices. By downloading or using the App, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information Collected Automatically

Analytics Data (via Google Firebase Analytics)

We use Firebase Analytics to understand how users interact with the App. This may include:

  • Device type, model, and operating system version
  • App version and session duration
  • Screen views and in-app events (e.g., which music categories are played)
  • General geographic region (country/city level)
  • Crash reports and performance data

This data is anonymised and aggregated — we cannot identify you personally from it.

Advertising Data (via Google AdMob)

The App displays advertisements through Google AdMob. AdMob may collect:

  • Advertising ID (Google Ad ID) to serve personalised or non-personalised ads
  • Device information and IP address
  • App usage data related to ad interactions

AdMob's data collection is governed by Google's Privacy Policy.

2.2 Information Stored Locally on Your Device

The App stores the following data only on your device and never transmits it to our servers:

  • Your selected music preferences and playback settings
  • Sleep timer duration and state (via Android DataStore)
  • Music playback history and progress (via Room local database)
  • Volume and category preferences

We have no access to this locally stored data.

2.3 Information We Do NOT Collect

We do not collect:

  • Your name, email address, or any personally identifiable information
  • Location data beyond country-level analytics
  • Contacts, messages, or files on your device
  • Audio recordings or microphone data
  • Camera data or photos

3. Permissions Used

Permission Purpose
WAKE_LOCK Keeps audio playing when the screen turns off during sleep
SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM Enables sleep timer to stop music at precise time you set
VIBRATE Provides subtle haptic feedback when you tap buttons
INTERNET Required for loading advertisements and sending analytics

No permission is used beyond stated purpose.

4. How We Use Your Information

We use automatically collected data to:

  • Improve App — understand most used features and fix issues
  • Analyse performance — monitor crashes and fix bugs through Firebase Crashlytics
  • Display advertisements — serve relevant ads to keep App free
  • App updates — prompt when new version available via Google Play In-App Updates

5. Third-Party Services

App integrates following third-party services. Each has own privacy policy:

Service Purpose Privacy Policy
Google Firebase Analytics Usage analytics https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy
Google AdMob Advertising https://policies.google.com/privacy
Google Play In-App Review Prompt app rating https://policies.google.com/privacy
Google Play In-App Update App update prompts https://policies.google.com/privacy

We do not sell, trade, or rent your data to any other third parties.

6. Children's Privacy

App designed for general audiences and not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are parent or guardian and believe your child has provided personal data, contact us and we will take steps to remove that information.

7. Data Retention

  • Analytics data retained by Firebase for up to 14 months (default Firebase setting)
  • Local app data stays on your device until uninstall App or clear App data
  • We do not maintain any user database or server-side storage

8. Data Security

All data transmitted by third-party SDKs (Firebase, AdMob) uses industry-standard encryption (HTTPS/TLS). Local data stored in App's private sandboxed storage, inaccessible to other apps.

9. Your Rights and Choices

Advertising Preferences

You can opt out of personalised ads at any time:

  • Go to Settings > Google > Ads > Delete advertising ID (Android 12+)
  • Or enable "Opt out of ads personalisation" on older Android versions

Analytics Opt-Out

Firebase Analytics respects advertising ID opt-out setting above.

Delete Local Data

You can clear all locally stored App data at any time: Settings > Apps > Relaxing Sleep Music > Storage > Clear Data

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes reflected by updating "Last updated" date at top of this page. We encourage periodic review. Continued use of App after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of updated policy.
